title: Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
